---
title: "Ebb and Flow, or, He did his best:  A Story of Five Years Ago"
---

## Ebb and Flow, or, He did his best:  A Story of Five Years Ago

**Author:** Elizabeth Wordsworth
**Date:** 1883
**Imprint:** London: Smith

### Notes

Published pseudonymously under the name \'Grant Lloyd\'.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
